goal: Scaffold MCP domain servers: auth, rate limiting, property, market, graph, commute, finance, system

decisions.decision: HMAC-based scoped tokens for MCP auth instead of JWT or API keys
decisions.rationale: HMAC is stateless, fast, and allows scoping to specific tool sets per agent. No token storage needed. JWT is overkill for stdio transport.

decisions.decision: Sliding window rate limiting per agent and per tool rather than fixed window
decisions.rationale: Fixed windows allow bursts at window boundaries. Sliding window provides smoother rate enforcement. In-memory state is fine since MCP servers are single-process.

decisions.decision: Each domain server is self-contained in mcp/servers/<name>/ with own tools.ts and schemas
decisions.rationale: Self-contained servers enable independent development and testing. Safe parallel zone — multiple agents can work on different servers simultaneously.

log.detail: Read MCP entry point, tool registry, and existing patterns
Claimed MCP-001 (auth), MCP-002 (rate limit), MCP-003 (config). Reserved mcp/shared/** and mcp/src/core/**
Implemented HMAC scoped auth tokens: generate, validate, scope check, expiry enforcement
Implemented sliding window rate limiter with per-agent and per-tool limits, 429 + retry-after
Implemented centralized config loader with typed env vars, validation, defaults per domain
cd mcp && npm run build — all 3 infrastructure modules compile
Add MCP infrastructure: HMAC auth, sliding window rate limiter, typed config loader
Scaffolded property server: search, detail, ZPID resolution, comparison tools with Zod validation
Scaffolded market server: trends, price history, inventory, competitive analysis
Scaffolded graph server: similarity, explain relationships, neighborhood analysis (parameterized Cypher)
Scaffolded commute server: address geocoding, reverse geocoding, commute time, transit scoring
Scaffolded finance server: mortgage calculator, ROI projections, affordability checks
Scaffolded system server: cache management, health checks, monitoring endpoints
cd mcp && npm run build — all 6 domain servers compile cleanly
Scaffold 6 MCP domain servers: property, market, graph, commute, finance, system
Completed all 8 MCP beads. Released mcp/** reservations.

summary: Scaffolded the complete MCP layer. Completed 8 beads: MCP-001 (HMAC auth), MCP-002 (rate limiter), MCP-003 (config loader), MCP-004-008 (6 domain servers). All compile and follow consistent patterns. Unblocked CROSS-001 for orchestration-MCP integration.
